task_completion.description: Verify the document uses Arial 12pt font globally and the title block is formatted correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The font dropdown in the word processor toolbar should show 'Arial' and '12' for body text. The first three lines (title block) should be visibly centered, bolded, and larger (14pt).

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Heading 1' style is applied to the 8 major section titles.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Section titles like 'Introduction', 'Purpose of the Research', 'Study Procedures', etc., should be visibly formatted as Heading 1 (typically larger, bold, and distinct from body text, or indicated in the Styles pane/dropdown).

task_completion.description: Verify the bulleted list under 'Risks and Discomforts'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Risks and Discomforts' heading, there should be a bulleted list containing exactly: nausea, severe fatigue, mild dizziness, and temporary injection site swelling.

task_completion.description: Verify the specific paragraph under 'Voluntary Participation' is bolded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The paragraph beginning with 'Your participation in this research is entirely voluntary...' must be entirely in bold text.

task_completion.description: Verify the document footer contains the required protocol and version information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bottom margin (footer area) of the document pages should display the text 'Protocol: ONC-2026-01' and 'Version 2.1 - March 2026'.

task_completion.description: Verify a 3x3 signature table is inserted at the end of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At the very end of the document, there is a 3x3 table. The top row headers ('Name', 'Signature', 'Date') must be bold. The first column of the second and third rows should contain 'Participant' and 'Principal Investigator'.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the word processor or a file explorer window should show the file saved as 'final_icf_v2.docx' in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical word processor to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processing application (like LibreOffice Writer) open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands or python scripts executing the changes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent edited the actual draft document rather than creating a dummy file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should contain the full text of a clinical trial Informed Consent Form, not just the isolated headings, lists, and tables requested in the prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the 'Save As' dialog or the application window updating its title to 'final_icf_v2.docx', rather than the agent just copying/renaming the file in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file is '/home/ga/Documents/final_icf_v2.docx'. The document must use Arial font at 12pt globally. The footer must contain 'ONC-2026-01' and 'Version 2.1'.
